title: Shri Kushmanda Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Kushmanda Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Kushmanda.
description:
Om Jai Kushmanda Mata,
Maiya Jai Kushmanda Mata.
Chauthe Navratre ki puja,
Jo man se gaata॥
॥ Om Jai Kushmanda Mata ॥

Andaj ki saagar se utpann,
Brahmand ki tu gyata.
Asht bhujaon wali maiya,
Sabki dukh harta॥
॥ Om Jai Kushmanda Mata ॥

Teri mahima sabse nyari,
Sab jag ke bhagya vidhata.
Bhakton ko vardaan de mata,
Sankat sab taalta॥
॥ Om Jai Kushmanda Mata ॥

Kamal pushp par tum virajo,
Singh ki sawari mata.
Jo koi teri mahima gaave,
Sab sukh vah paata॥
॥ Om Jai Kushmanda Mata ॥

Maa Kushmanda ki aarti,
Jo koi jan gaave.
Riddhi-siddhi sab sukh sampati,
Ghar baithe paave॥
॥ Om Jai Kushmanda Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Kushmanda's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Kushmanda is considered the 'Creator of the Universe'. Her Aarti helps in revitalizing energy, removing illnesses, and bestowing radiance upon the devotee.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: The fourth day of Navratri (Chaturthi) is dedicated to Maa Kushmanda and is considered the most auspicious for her worship and Aarti.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Mother Kushmanda during Aarti?
faq.a3: She is very fond of Malpua, curd, and Halwa as offerings.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed with full devotion and purity in the home temple on the fourth day of Navratri.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Devi Kushmandayai Namah' after the Aarti is very fruitful for mental happiness and spiritual growth.
